## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue
(e.g. `Closes #123`).

## How to test

Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check .` / `npm run lint`)
- [ ] Types pass (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`) and new tests added where it makes sense
- [ ] No secrets or real `.env` values committed
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
